uz.Bu bo'limda yangi sinf qo'shish va mavju: Bu bo'limda yangi sinf qo'shish va mavjud sinflarni boshqarish mumkin.

uz.Izoh maydoni bo'sh bo'lishi mumkin emas: Izoh maydoni bo'sh bo'lishi mumkin emas
uz.Masalan: Ota-onasi bilan gaplashildi, ke: Masalan: Ota-onasi bilan gaplashildi, keyingi haftada to'lov qilishini aytdi.
uz.Menejer faqat qarzdor o'quvchilar bilan: Menejer faqat qarzdor o'quvchilar bilan ishlaydi va ota-ona bilan aloqa izohini yozadi.
uz.Sinf baholari anonim ko'rinishda (indivi: Sinf baholari anonim ko'rinishda (individual o'quvchi ma'lumoti yashirilgan).

uz.Tanlangan oylarning bir qismi oldin qopl: Tanlangan oylarning bir qismi oldin qoplangan

uz.Baholarni sana, sinf va tur bo'yicha fil: Baholarni sana, sinf va tur bo'yicha filtrlang.

uz.Izoh yozish, tarix ko'rish, tez to'lov b: Izoh yozish, tarix ko'rish, tez to'lov belgilash
uz.Qarzdorlar bilan aloqa va to'lov nazorat: Qarzdorlar bilan aloqa va to'lov nazorati
uz.Qarzdorlar bo'limiga o'tib, ota-ona bila: Qarzdorlar bo'limiga o'tib, ota-ona bilan gaplashuv izohlarini yozing va kerak bo'lsa tezkor to'lov amallarini bajaring.
uz.Sana va darsni tanlab davomat hamda baho: Sana va darsni tanlab davomat hamda baholarni saqlang.
uz.Saqlashdan keyin ushbu o'quvchining baho: Saqlashdan keyin ushbu o'quvchining bahosi o'chiriladi
uz.Sinf, fan va vaqt oralig'i tanlang: Sinf, fan va vaqt oralig'i tanlang
uz.Student yaratilgach, profil sahifasidan: Student yaratilgach, profil sahifasidan hujjat yuklashni davom ettirish mumkin
uz.Teacher ma'lumotlari saqlanadi va profil: Teacher ma'lumotlari saqlanadi va profil sahifasiga o'tish mumkin bo'ladi
uz.Reja = kutilgan tushum, Tushum = amalda: Reja = kutilgan tushum, Tushum = amalda tushgan pul, Qarz = shu oy yopilmagan summa.
uz.Quyidagi kartalar tanlangan sinf / ro'yx: Quyidagi kartalar tanlangan sinf / ro'yxat ko'rinishiga bog'liq ma'lumotlar
uz.Pastdagi jadvalni ko'rish uchun sinfni t: Pastdagi jadvalni ko'rish uchun sinfni tanlang. Yuqoridagi umumiy statistika ko'rinishda qoladi.
uz.Oylik summa kiriting, yillik summa avtom: Oylik summa kiriting, yillik summa avtomatik hisoblanadi (to'lov oylar soni asosida).
uz.Oylar pastdagi billing calendar'dan tanl: Oylar pastdagi billing calendar'dan tanlanadi. Tanlanmagan oylar ta'til deb olinadi.
uz.Ushbu calendar faqat tanlangan o'quv yil: Ushbu calendar faqat tanlangan o'quv yilidagi qaysi oylar to'lovli / ta'til ekanini belgilaydi.
uz.Alohida o'qituvchi stavkasi bo'lmasa, sh: Alohida o'qituvchi stavkasi bo'lmasa, shu fan stavkasi qo'llanadi.
uz.Bandlik holati foydalanuvchi (User) faol: Bandlik holati foydalanuvchi (User) faolligidan olinadi va bu oynada qo'lda tahrirlanmaydi.
Barcha faol o'qituvchilar ko'rsatiladi. Hisoblanmaganlar alohida holatda turadi.
uz.Bu holatda asosiy amal mavjud emas: Bu holatda asosiy amal mavjud emas
uz.Bu stavka fan bo'yicha umumiy stavkadan: Bu stavka fan bo'yicha umumiy stavkadan ustun turadi.
uz.Fan bo'yicha umumiy standart stavka yara: Fan bo'yicha umumiy standart stavka yarating
uz.Fanlar bo'yicha standart soat narxlarini: Fanlar bo'yicha standart soat narxlarini boshqaring.
uz.Faqat asosiy oqim: yaratish, ko'rish, ta: Faqat asosiy oqim: yaratish, ko'rish, tasdiqlash va to'lash
uz.Faqat qo'lda rejimda bu xodim uchun to'l: Faqat qo'lda rejimda bu xodim uchun to'lovlar avtomatik hisoblanmaydi.
uz.FIXED/MIXED rejimda oklad bo'sh yoki 0 b: FIXED/MIXED rejimda oklad bo'sh yoki 0 bo'lishi mumkin emas. Okladni tozalash uchun bo'sh qoldiring va boshqa rejimni tanlang.
uz.FIXED/MIXED rejimda oklad summasi musbat: FIXED/MIXED rejimda oklad summasi musbat bo'lishi shart
uz.Kam ishlatiladigan bo'limlar shu yerga y: Kam ishlatiladigan bo'limlar shu yerga yig'ilgan
uz.Menejer uchun ko'rish va tasdiqlash reji: Menejer uchun ko'rish va tasdiqlash rejimi. Yaratish, stavka, dars, to'lash va bekor qilish amallari yopiq.
uz.Minimal oqim: oy tanlash, hisob-kitobni: Minimal oqim: oy tanlash, hisob-kitobni ko'rish, tasdiqlash va to'lash.
uz.Muayyan o'qituvchi uchun fan kesimida al: Muayyan o'qituvchi uchun fan kesimida alohida soat narxini belgilang.
uz.O'qituvchi + fan bo'yicha alohida stavka: O'qituvchi + fan bo'yicha alohida stavka yarating
uz.Oklad rejimida oylik summa musbat bo'lis: Oklad rejimida oylik summa musbat bo'lishi shart. Dars + oklad rejimida ikki qism birga hisoblanadi.
uz.Ommaviy yangilash: {{updated}} ta yangil: Ommaviy yangilash: {{updated}} ta yangilandi, {{skipped}} ta o'tkazib yuborildi
uz.Oy davomida berilgan avansni kiriting. H: Oy davomida berilgan avansni kiriting. Hisoblash paytida bu summa ushlanadi.
uz.Qisman to'lov: tanlangan qarz oylarining: Qisman to'lov: tanlangan qarz oylarining bir qismi yopiladi.
uz.Soat narxi topilmagan darslar bor: {{cou: Soat narxi topilmagan darslar bor: {{count}} ta
uz.Stavka qiymati va amal qilish muddatini: Stavka qiymati va amal qilish muddatini yangilang
uz.Tanlangan davr bo'yicha to'lov hisoblab: Tanlangan davr bo'yicha to'lov hisoblab bo'lmadi (tarif yoki qarz ma'lumoti yetarli emas).
uz.Tanlangan davrda qarz bo'lmagan oylar ha: Tanlangan davrda qarz bo'lmagan oylar ham bor. Ular oldindan to'lov sifatida hisoblanadi
uz.Tanlangan oy uchun hisob-kitob topilmadi: Tanlangan oy uchun hisob-kitob topilmadi. Avval Yaratish tugmasini bosing.
uz.To'lov olinadigan oylar soni 1-12 oralig: To'lov olinadigan oylar soni 1-12 oralig'ida bo'lishi kerak
uz.Tuzatma faqat loyiha (DRAFT) holatidagi: Tuzatma faqat loyiha (DRAFT) holatidagi hisob-kitobga qo'shiladi.
uz.Xodimlar uchun oylik turi, oklad va oyli: Xodimlar uchun oylik turi, oklad va oylikka kirish holatini sozlang.
uz.Yuboriladigan summa tanlangan qarz oylar: Yuboriladigan summa tanlangan qarz oylaridan katta bo'lmasligi kerak.

en.Dashboardga kirish uchun login qiling: Log in to access the dashboard
en.Bu bo'limda yangi sinf qo'shish va mavju: You can add and manage classrooms in this section.
No students in this classroom yet.
en.Tarix saqlanadi: eski sinflar arxivlanad: History is preserved: old classes are archived and students are moved to new academic-year classes.
en.Yillik o'tkazish preview olinmadi: Failed to load annual promotion preview
en.Bu studentni sinfdan chiqarilsinmi?: Remove this student from the class?
en.Studentni sinfdan chiqarib bo'lmadi: Failed to remove the student from the class
en.Student profilini saqlagan holda bu sinf: The student profile is kept, only the active enrollment in this class is closed.
en.Hozir sentyabr emas. Bu manual ishga tus: It is not September now. This will run manually.
en.Conflict mavjud: {{count}} ta. Avval mav: Conflicts found: {{count}}. Check existing classes first.
en.Tanlangan period bo'yicha tarix topilmad: No history found for selected period
en.Bu fan uchun o'qituvchi topilmadi. Avval: No teacher found for this subject. Create one first.
en.Tanlangan fan uchun o'qituvchi topilmadi: No teacher found for selected subject.
en.Tanlangan vaqt oralig'ida sinf yoki o'qi: Class or teacher is already busy at selected time. Choose another time/teacher.
en.Darsni bu slotga ko'chirib bo'lmaydi: sh: Cannot move to this slot: another lesson already exists at this time.
en.Bu katakka dars qo'shib bo'lmadi, chunki: Cannot add lesson to this cell because time slot is occupied.
en.Bo'limni tanlang: To'lovlar yoki Tarif s: Select a section: Payments or Tariff settings.
en.Faqat oylik va yillik narx bilan boshqar: Manage only monthly and yearly prices.
en.Masalan: Kelasi oy uchun yangi tarif: Example: New tariff for next month
en.Joriy tarif: oylik {{oylik}} so'm, yilli: Current tariff: monthly {{oylik}} UZS, yearly {{yillik}} UZS.
en.Tanlangan davrda yopiladigan qarz oy top: No debt months can be closed in selected range.
Amount is required for custom payment.
en.Yuboriladigan summa kutilgan summa bilan: Submitted amount must equal expected amount.
en.Student to'lov ma'lumotlari olinmadi: Failed to load student payment details
en.Bu bo'limda faqat qarzdor o'quvchilar bi: In this section, you only work with debtor students and add parent communication notes.
en.Bu bo'limda o'qituvchi uchun qisqa stati: This section shows quick stats for the teacher.
en.Bu bo'limda student o'z jadvali va davom: In this section, the student can view schedule and attendance data.
en.Bu dars uchun studentlar topilmadi: No students found for this lesson
en.Masalan: Ota-onasi bilan gaplashildi, ke: Example: Talked to parent, promised to pay next week.
en.Menejer faqat qarzdor o'quvchilar bilan: Manager works only with debtor students and records parent communication notes.
en.Saqlash uchun studentlar ro'yxati topilm: No student list found to save
en.Sinf baholari anonim ko'rinishda (indivi: Class grades are anonymized (individual student data hidden).
en.Sizda qarzdorlik yo'q. Barcha oylar to'l: You have no debt. All months are paid.
en.Tanlangan period bo'yicha davomat topilm: No attendance found for selected period
en.Tez amallar orqali 1 oy yoki barcha qarz: Using quick actions, you can pay 1 month or close the full debt.
en.Parol kamida 8 ta belgidan iborat bo'lis: Password must be at least 8 characters
en.Kiritilgan yangi parol saqlansinmi? Eski: Save the new password? The old password will no longer work.
en.Yuqoridagi kartalar umumiy statistika. P: Top cards show overall statistics. The table below is filtered by the selected class.
en.Tanlangan oylarning bir qismi oldin qopl: Some selected months are already covered
en.Baholarni filtrlang va o'zingiz/sinf kes: Filter grades and view them by yourself/class.
en.Baholarni sana, sinf va tur bo'yicha fil: Filter grades by date, class and type.
en.Davomat tarixini period va holat bo'yich: View attendance history by period and status.
en.Faqat preview tekshirilib tasdiqlanganda: Run only after reviewing and confirming the preview
en.Izoh yozish, tarix ko'rish, tez to'lov b: Write notes, view history, and mark quick payments
en.Qarzdorlar bo'limiga o'tib, ota-ona bila: Open the debtors section, record parent call notes, and perform quick payment actions when needed.
en.Sana va darsni tanlab davomat hamda baho: Select date and lesson, then save attendance and grades.
en.Saqlashdan keyin ushbu o'quvchining baho: This student's grade will be deleted after saving
en.Sinf, fan va vaqt oralig'i tanlang: Select class, subject and time slot
en.Student yaratilgach, profil sahifasidan: After creating the student, you can continue uploading documents on the profile page
en.Tanlangan tarifni rollback qilmoqchimisi: Do you want to rollback the selected tariff?
en.Teacher ma'lumotlari saqlanadi va profil: Teacher data will be saved and you can go to the profile page
en.To'lov tranzaksiyasini bekor qilmoqchimi: Do you want to revert this payment transaction?
en.Reja = kutilgan tushum, Tushum = amalda: Plan = expected income, Received = actual received money, Debt = unpaid amount for this month.
en.Quyidagi kartalar tanlangan sinf / ro'yx: The cards below depend on selected class / list view.
en.Pastdagi jadvalni ko'rish uchun sinfni t: Select a class to view the table below. Overall statistics above remain visible.
en.Oylik summa kiriting, yillik summa avtom: Enter monthly amount. Yearly amount is calculated automatically (based on billable months).
en.Oylar pastdagi billing calendar'dan tanl: Months are selected in the billing calendar below. Unselected months are treated as vacation.
en.Ushbu calendar faqat tanlangan o'quv yil: This calendar defines which months are billable / vacation in the selected academic year only.
en.Alohida o'qituvchi stavkasi bo'lmasa, sh: If no custom teacher rate is set, the subject rate is applied.
en.Avans yozuvini o'chirmoqchimisiz?: Do you want to delete this advance record?
en.Bandlik holati foydalanuvchi (User) faol: Employment status is derived from user activity and cannot be edited here.
All active teachers are shown. Non-generated entries are shown separately.
en.Bu holatda asosiy amal mavjud emas: No primary action available in this ste
en.Bu rejimda oklad qo'llanmaydi: Fixed salary is not used in this mode
en.Bu stavka fan bo'yicha umumiy stavkadan: This rate overrides the default subject rate.
en.Fan bo'yicha standart stavkani o'chirmoq: Do you want to delete the default subject rate?
en.Fan bo'yicha umumiy standart stavka yara: Create a default rate for this subject
en.Fanlar bo'yicha standart soat narxlarini: Manage default hourly rates by subject.
en.Faqat asosiy oqim: yaratish, ko'rish, ta: Core flow only: create, view, approve and pay
en.Faqat qo'lda rejimda bu xodim uchun to'l: In manual-only mode payments for this employee are not calculated automatically.
en.FIXED/MIXED rejimda oklad bo'sh yoki 0 b: In FIXED/MIXED mode fixed salary cannot be empty or 0. Clear salary and switch mode if needed.
en.FIXED/MIXED rejimda oklad summasi musbat: In FIXED/MIXED mode fixed salary must be positive
en.Hisob-kitobni tasdiqlaysizmi?: Do you want to approve this payroll run?
en.Kam ishlatiladigan bo'limlar shu yerga y: Less frequently used sections are grouped here
en.Menejer uchun ko'rish va tasdiqlash reji: Manager mode for view and approval only. Generate/rates/lessons/pay/reverse actions are disabled.
en.Minimal oqim: oy tanlash, hisob-kitobni: Minimal flow: select month, review run, approve and pay.
en.Muayyan o'qituvchi uchun fan kesimida al: Set a custom hourly rate by subject for a specific teacher.
en.O'qituvchi + fan bo'yicha alohida stavka: Create custom rate by teacher + subject
en.O'qituvchi stavkasini o'chirmoqchimisiz?: Do you want to delete this teacher rate?
en.Oklad rejimida oylik summa musbat bo'lis: In fixed mode salary must be positive. In lesson + fixed mode both parts are calculated together.
en.Oy davomida berilgan avansni kiriting. H: Enter advance paid during the month. This amount is deducted during calculation.
en.Oylik summa {{min}} - {{max}} oralig'ida: Monthly amount must be between {{min}} and {{max}}
en.Qisman to'lov: tanlangan qarz oylarining: Partial payment: only part of selected debt months will be covered.
en.Stavka qiymati va amal qilish muddatini: Update rate value and effective dates
en.Tanlangan darslar yangilanmadi (hammasi: Selected lessons were not updated (all skipped)
en.Tanlangan davr bo'yicha to'lov hisoblab: Unable to calculate payment for selected period (insufficient tariff or debt data).
en.Tanlangan davrda qarz bo'lmagan oylar ha: Selected period also includes non-debt months. They are treated as prepayment.
en.Tanlangan oy uchun hisob-kitob topilmadi: No run found for selected month. Click Create first.
en.To'lov olinadigan oylar soni 1-12 oralig: Billable months count must be between 1 and 12
en.Tuzatma faqat loyiha (DRAFT) holatidagi: Adjustment can only be added to a DRAFT run.
en.Xodimlar uchun oylik turi, oklad va oyli: Configure payroll type, fixed salary and payroll eligibility for employees.
en.Yillik summa {{min}} - {{max}} oralig'id: Yearly amount must be between {{min}} and {{max}}
en.Yuboriladigan summa tanlangan qarz oylar: Submitted amount must not exceed selected debt months.

ru.Davomat tarixini period va holat bo'yich: View attendance history by period and status.
ru.Faqat preview tekshirilib tasdiqlanganda: Run only after reviewing and confirming the preview

ru.Sana va darsni tanlab davomat hamda baho: Select date and lesson, then save attendance and grades.

ru.Reja = kutilgan tushum, Tushum = amalda: План = ожидаемые поступления, Поступления = фактически полученные деньги, Долг = незакрытая сумма за этот месяц.

ru.Pastdagi jadvalni ko'rish uchun sinfni t: Выберите класс, чтобы увидеть таблицу ниже. Верхняя общая статистика останется без изменений.
ru.Oylik summa kiriting, yillik summa avtom: Введите месячную сумму, годовая сумма рассчитывается автоматически (по числу оплачиваемых месяцев).
ru.Oylar pastdagi billing calendar'dan tanl: Месяцы выбираются в billing calendar ниже. Невыбранные месяцы считаются каникулами.
ru.Ushbu calendar faqat tanlangan o'quv yil: Этот календарь задаёт, какие месяцы в выбранном учебном году являются платными / каникулярными.
ru.Alohida o'qituvchi stavkasi bo'lmasa, sh: If no custom teacher rate is set, the subject rate is applied.
ru.Bandlik holati foydalanuvchi (User) faol: Employment status is derived from user activity and cannot be edited here.
Показаны все активные учителя. Нерассчитанные отображаются отдельным статусом.
ru.Bu holatda asosiy amal mavjud emas: Bu holatda asosiy amal mavjud emas

ru.Kam ishlatiladigan bo'limlar shu yerga y: Less frequently used sections are grouped here

ru.O'qituvchi + fan bo'yicha alohida stavka: Create custom rate by teacher + subject
ru.Oklad rejimida oylik summa musbat bo'lis: In fixed mode salary must be positive. In lesson + fixed mode both parts are calculated together.
